target_area.description: Gate 4 paragraph in Method and adjacent Results/Figure 2 spread

change_summary: Recast Gate 4 as an embodied-stack entry check to match the evidence-gate story.
Replaced the old process sentence with a tighter account of the official KuJiaLe route supplying matched original/noMDL scenes for InternNav and DualVLN.
Kept the claim boundary explicit: selected-stack entry and load/render trials, not a broad navigation benchmark.

observations: Before: page 4 rendered a visibly stretched 'We run' line in the Gate 4 paragraph.
Before: page 4 rendered 'from the of-' followed by 'ficial KuJiaLe' and 'through In-' followed by 'ternNav'.
Intermediate wording with 'smoke test' was rejected because it split the phrase across lines and produced a high-badness method underfull.
Intermediate wording that retained the monospace val_unseen token was rejected because it produced a badness-10000 Gate 4 line.
Intermediate wording with 'InternNav/DualVLN stack' was rejected because it introduced worse Gate 4 underfulls.

After: page 4 renders the Gate 4 paragraph as an embodied-stack entry check, removes the stretched 'We run' line and the old official/InternNav split markers, and keeps the boundary against broad navigation benchmarks.
After: a minor 'Du-'/'alVLN' split remains, but Results, Figure 2, and page 5 flow remain stable.

verification.command: rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|Rerun to get|Warning:.*Label|Undefined references|multiply defined|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log || true

verification.evidence: ok=true; title and abstract match metadata; abstract_word_count=169

verification.command: rg -n "lines 57--63|Gate 4 is the embodied-stack|official KuJiaLe route supplies|We run|through In-|from the of-" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log tmp/acl_main_visual_iter_20260606_round38_current/page4.txt tmp/acl_main_visual_iter_20260606_round38_after/page4.txt paper/venues/acl27/sections/method.tex || true
verification.evidence: Current page 4 text contains the old stretched/split markers; after page 4 text and method.tex contain the final Gate 4 entry-check wording; build log has no lines 57--63 Gate 4 underfull entry.

workspace_note: The repository had unrelated pre-existing modified paper, docs, evidence, figure, and test files before this round. This evidence record only claims the round38 Method Gate 4 paragraph polish plus the new record/evidence files.
